confirmed_claims.claim: Frontend stack includes SvelteKit, Svelte 5, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest, and Playwright.

deployment_notes.reason: .runtime/staging.report.json remains the authoritative runtime environment blocker inventory used by deployment tooling.

incorrect_claims.correction: A fresh backend collection run reported 6404 tests collected.

incorrect_claims.claim: FinOps capabilities include 11 zombie detection plugins
incorrect_claims.correction: A structural scan found 56 ZombiePlugin subclasses across provider adapters.

limitations: Live cutover evidence and operator sign-off are validated outside this repository.

partial_or_overstated_claims.claim: Repository source alone proves live staging and production cutover completion.
partial_or_overstated_claims.correction: Live cutover evidence and final operator sign-off remain environment events outside source control.

high_confidence_findings: The dashboard uses SvelteKit, Svelte 5, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest, and Playwright.
important_corrections: Backend tests collected currently total 6404, not 5358.
Zombie detection plugin classes total 56 across providers, not 11.
summary.overall: Repository audit baseline refreshed from live measured facts.
